guardrails: Displayed prices are demo menu values for internal evaluator calculations only; shoppers see bakery-confirmed pricing language instead of unverified public prices.
Pickup time, inventory, allergens, delivery, and special requests still require bakery confirmation.
Ready-made classic cakes first; decoration is small and optional, not custom cake production.

products.name: cake "Honey"
products.description: Soft honey layers with warm cream. The safe, loved choice for family tables and birthdays.

products.name: cake "Napoleon"
products.description: Buttery puff layers with vanilla custard. Crisp, creamy, and easy to share.

products.name: cake "Milk Maiden"
products.description: Light vanilla biscuit and tender butter cream. Gentle, sweet, and children-friendly.

products.name: cake "Pistachio Roll"
products.description: Light meringue, butter cream, pistachio, and a bright raspberry finish.
